# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Some section

Some description...


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [write_parquet](write_parquet.qmd#pd_lfs.parquet.write_parquet) | Write df to path/ as part-*.parquet with a _manifest.json index. |
| [read_parquet](read_parquet.qmd#pd_lfs.parquet.read_parquet) | Read a dataset written by write_parquet. Accepts local paths or https URLs. |
